---
title: "useNeuralData.ts"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\tools\pennyone\vis\logic\useNeuralData.ts"
loc: 62
complexity: 13
logic_score: 4.88
style_score: 3.95
intel_score: 5.87
overall_score: 4.19
---

## Intent
The `useNeuralData.ts` module implements the data transformation logic for the visual cortex. It processes the raw repository scan results (compiled graph) into the specific node and link structures required by the D3-force simulation and Three.js rendering layers.

## Interaction Protocol
This is a custom React hook used in the `NeuralGraph` component. It performs the initial data mapping, link resolution, and state initialization, providing a clean interface for accessing the repository's neural structure.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 4.9/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 5.9/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 10 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [useMemo](file://react)
- [Node](file://../types/index.ts)
- [Link](file://../types/index.ts)

### Exports
- `useNeuralData`
- `useNeuralData`
- `fallback`
- `files`
- `nodes`
- `nodeMap`
- `linkList`
- `usedIds`
- `pathStr`
- `orphans`
- `STELLAR_MAP`
- `STELLAR_MAP`
- `getStar`
- `getStar`
- `p`
